items.name: Testing Sword
items.description: A deliberately overpowered sword for fast combat testing.

items.name: Testing Bow
items.description: A deliberately overpowered bow for fast ranged combat testing.

items.name: Normal Bow
items.description: A plain bow for baseline archer testing.

items.name: Fang of the Red Viper
items.description: A crimson spear whose twin wounds never quite close.

items.name: Testing Armor
items.description: A deliberately overpowered cuirass for survivability testing.

items.name: Fur Cloak
items.description: A thick white wolf pelt worn over the shoulders.

items.name: Venom Fang
items.description: A crooked blade coated in venom that never quite dries.

items.name: Whitefang Dagger
items.description: A pale fang honed into a cruel little blade. Its edge carries the bite of winter and the hunger of the hunt.

items.name: Bandit's Stiletto
items.description: A narrow thrusting dagger favored by ambushers and cutpurses along the forest road.

items.name: Quiver
items.description: A fitted arrow case for ranged adventurers and beastmasters.

items.name: Bonefletch Quiver
items.description: A narrow quiver reinforced with carved bone plates. Its arrows seem to remember old battlefield rites.

items.name: Smoke Bomb
items.description: A brittle clay bomb packed with ash and pitch. Used while fleeing to cover your escape.

items.name: Flash Powder
items.description: A pinch of bright powder that bursts into a blinding flare when thrown.

items.name: Umbral Key
items.description: Four fragments fused into a single key. Opens the way to the Umbral.

items.name: Sacred Horn
items.description: A horn torn from the Elder Stag. It carries the aura of an ancient forest.

items.name: Cursed Relic
items.description: A fragment soaked in dark magic. It still pulses with the Lich's energy.

items.name: Broken Standard
items.description: The remains of a war banner. A symbol of an army already defeated.

items.name: Fire Scale
items.description: A scale from the Wyvern, still hot to the touch. The heat never fades.

items.name: Recipe: Stagheart Stew
items.description: Ancient knowledge of the glade. Teaches how to prepare Stagheart Stew.

items.name: Recipe: Antler Broth
items.description: Ancient knowledge of the glade. Teaches how to prepare Antler Broth.

relicPassive.description: Your first attack in each combat has 100% hit chance.
Each kill restores 10% of your max HP.
When your pet or ally hits, you gain an Impetus stack (+5% damage on your next attack, up to 3 stacks, consumed when you attack).
Your poisons and bleeds last 2s longer and deal +15% damage per tick.
Your critical hits apply burn: 3% of the enemy max HP over 2s.
Once per combat: a hit that would kill you leaves you at 1 HP.
Your attacks have an 8% chance to apply -3 armor to the enemy for 4s.
Regenerate 2 HP per second during combat.
Immune to bleed and poison for the first 5s of each combat.
When you take a hit greater than 15% of your max HP, gain a barrier that absorbs 50 damage.
Your active skills deal +8% additional damage.

items.name: Silkguard Buckler
items.description: A light buckler crafted from layered spider chitin. Favours evasion and countering over raw blocking.

items.name: Stonewall
items.description: A slab of living granite torn from the chest of a Stone Golem. The first blow it receives is always returned.

effects.name: First Wall
effects.description: The first incoming hit each combat is completely blocked at no Block Power cost. The blow is immediately answered with a full-damage counter.

items.name: Spider Silk Cape
items.description: Woven from tough cave spider silk. Whisper-light and harder to hit in.

items.name: Brood Venom Gland
items.description: A sac of concentrated venom harvested from the Broodmother. Pulsates faintly.

items.name: Chitin Plate
items.description: Brittle shell plating stripped from cave spiders. Useful for crafting.

items.name: Venomveil Cape
items.description: A cape woven from matriarch silk, imbued with venom-filtering properties.

items.name: Spider-Silk Satchel
items.description: A satchel woven from dense spider silk. Holds up to five extra campfires.

items.name: Royal Silk
items.description: Thick strands of silk spun by a spider matriarch.

items.name: Brood Chitin
items.description: A shard of dark chitinous plating from a broodmother.

items.name: Venom Sac
items.description: A swollen gland filled with concentrated spider venom.

items.name: Queen's Venom Sac
items.description: A relic from the deepest broodmother. Coats your strikes with lingering venom.

relicPassive.description: Your attacks have a 6% chance to apply Poison (0.4% max HP/tick for 3 ticks).

items.name: Gargoyle Stone Ring
items.description: Carved from a gargoyle's petrified knuckle. Dense and unyielding.

items.name: Imp Ember Ring
items.description: A scorched band still warm to the touch. Speeds the wearer's strikes.

items.name: Sentinel's Focus Ring
items.description: Worn by the animated guardians of Rootspire. Sharpens every blow.

items.name: Emberglass Ring
items.description: Fused from volcanic glass and ember shard. Deflects heat and arrows alike.

items.name: Veilstone Ring
items.description: A ring of dark obsidian that drinks in shadow. Rogues favor it for its uncanny lightness.

items.name: Hellhound Collar
items.description: Scorched iron links torn from a hellhound's neck. Still radiates hatred.

items.name: Warg Fang Necklace
items.description: A string of massive fangs from a warg alpha. Warriors wear it as a battle trophy.

items.name: Cinderward Amulet
items.description: Forged in a furnace and quenched in saltwater. Turns flame aside.

items.name: Umbralward Amulet
items.description: A pendant carved from shadow-infused stone. Muffles dark energies.

items.name: Black Knight Greaves
items.description: Heavy iron greaves stripped from a fallen knight of Rootspire.

items.name: Black Knight Gauntlets
items.description: Plated gauntlets engraved with Rootspire's sigil. Iron-hard, battle-worn.

items.name: Living Armblade
items.description: A sword fused from the animated shell of a Rootspire armor guardian. Shimmers faintly, as if it remembers how to block.

items.name: Hollowguard Visor
items.description: The hollow faceplate of a Rootspire armor guardian. The eyeslits still track movement on their own.

items.name: Halberd
items.description: A long-hafted blade favored by knights and mercenaries. Slow but devastating.

items.name: Emberward Cape
items.description: A treated wool cape with fire-resistant lining. Standard issue for Rootspire's elite.

items.name: Nightfall Cape
items.description: A black silk cape that swallows light. Rogues love how it blurs their silhouette.

items.name: Troll Hide Bag
items.description: A rugged bag cured from troll hide. Holds more campfires and opens an extra column of inventory.

items.name: Bone Hook Rack
items.description: A lightweight rack made of animal bone. Carry one extra campfire.

items.name: Forager's Satchel
items.description: A woven satchel that lets you grab an extra handful each time you gather.

items.name: Spineback
items.description: A bow strung with manticore sinew, its stave threaded with venomous spines. Each arrow carries the pit's poison.

relicPassive.description: Your attacks have a 10% chance to poison the target.

items.name: Chimeric Mantle
items.description: Stitched from the hide of Kharvox himself. The runes sewn into its lining still pulse with his master's will.

items.name: Ironthane's Left Signet
items.description: One of a matched pair, worn by High Thane Durnek Ironthane. The brand of rulership, cast in iron and rune-fire.

items.name: Ironthane's Right Signet
items.description: One of a matched pair, worn by High Thane Durnek Ironthane. The brand of rulership, cast in iron and rune-fire.

items.name: Ironthane's Medallion
items.description: The third piece of the High Thane's regalia. Together the set radiates an authority that bends lesser will.
